DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Gregory Smith, Esq. (310.540.1505; grsmith@maloneyfirm.com) of The Maloney Firm APC for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

The court noted there was no compliance with tentative ruling rule.
Discussed. Mr. Smith stated that although they did not file an opposition, they filed an amended complaint as a response to the demurrer. The court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS ANIL ADVANI and INVENTUS LAW's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is mooted by the first amended complaint on file.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
